_comment: RQ Talent job scraper config. Edit this file to add/remove sources. No code changes needed.
_comment_region: UAE-focused, all sectors. To also pull Qatar/KSA, add them back to target_countries.
_comment_keywords: Used only by the aggregator APIs (Jooble/Careerjet). Broad + sector-agnostic so the feed spans hospitality, construction, finance, healthcare, technology, energy.
_comment_aggregators: Aggregator APIs cover the Gulf and return JSON. Get free keys (see INTEGRATION.md) and set them as GitHub repo secrets. Left blank = adapter skipped.
_comment_careerjet: Careerjet v4 needs the API key as secret CAREERJET_API_KEY. It ALSO requires you to pre-declare the calling server's IP in your Careerjet publisher dashboard — so it only works from a fixed IP (static host/proxy), not GitHub Actions. careerjet_referer must match your declared publisher site.
_comment_workday: Workday job API — OPEN, NO KEY. The big oilfield-services / energy firms use this. Each entry was verified to return real Gulf roles (Jun 2026). To add a company: open its careers page, note the URL host + the path segment after the language code (e.g. https://bakerhughes.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/BakerHughes -> host=bakerhughes.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com, tenant=bakerhughes, site=BakerHughes).
_comment_smartrecruiters: SmartRecruiters postings API — OPEN, NO KEY. Filtered server-side to your target countries. AECOM (construction) verified with 140+ live UAE roles (Jun 2026). company = the id in the careers URL careers.smartrecruiters.com/<id>.
_comment_hospitality: Hospitality has no clean open feed in the UAE (Marriott/Hilton/Jumeirah use closed ATSes). It comes through the Jooble/Careerjet aggregator keys, which are sector-agnostic.
_comment_ats: Open ATS APIs (no key). Entries can be a plain token or {token, company, industry}. Verify a Greenhouse token at https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/TOKEN/jobs or a Lever one at https://api.lever.co/v0/postings/TOKEN?mode=json. Most UAE banks/hospitality use closed ATSes (no open feed) — those come via the aggregator keys.
_comment_rss: Optional RSS/Atom job feeds. Best-effort; may be IP-blocked. Add full feed URLs.
